rationale: The potential US-Iran deal remains unresolved with conflicting signals, keeping energy price uncertainty alive for Poland; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty over a US-Iran nuclear/sanctions deal keeps oil market volatility elevated, indirectly affecting energy costs for Polish households and businesses.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: US federal AI policy shift has marginal indirect relevance to Poland's tech sector and EU AI regulation landscape, but no direct daily-life impact yet.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on plan to cap population at 10 million
top_events.summary: Swiss referendum on population cap is a minor EU-adjacent political event with negligible direct impact on Polish residents.
